x-enumeration-literals.name: Funeral Expense
x-enumeration-literals.description: Covers costs related to funeral services, such as ceremonies, service providers, and related arrangements.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Burial Cost
x-enumeration-literals.description: Covers burial or cremation expenses, including plot fees, caskets, urns, or related cemetery charges.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Dependent Support
x-enumeration-literals.description: Provides pre-agreed financial support for dependents or beneficiaries of the insured, if this benefit is included in the policy.
